name: rfc-review-security
description: Deep-dive security review of a technical RFC — threat model, trust boundaries, attack surface, input validation, crypto, authN/authZ, secrets, supply chain, privacy, and audit. Produces a written review report.
author: Claude Code

usage.description: Focused security review of an RFC. Walks threat model, trust boundaries, attack surface, input validation, crypto, authN/authZ, secrets, supply chain, privacy, and audit. Can be invoked standalone or as a follow-up from /rfc-review. Not for reviewing implementation diffs — use /security-review for that.
